skills.name: sms-review

Checks feature flag wrapping, exposed/debug code, React bad practices, dangerous linter disabling, DRY violations, and MCDS CSS compliance. Scoped to web/js/src/Main/Sms and web/js/src/Main/SmsBulk. Use before pushing or creating a PR for any SMS-related frontend changes, or whenever the user says "review my SMS changes", "check my SMS code", or asks if their SMS/SmsBulk changes are ready to push.

Use when the user runs /substack-notes-scraper, asks to scrape/analyze Substack notes, or wants a metrics report on Substack posts.

skills.name: sycophancy-buster
